# AirLock Phase 1 fixtures

Real-world-derived malicious page snippets for extractor and deterministic risk scanning.

## Sources

1. **OWASP Prompt Injection**  
   https://owasp.org/www-community/attacks/PromptInjection
2. **OWASP LLM Prompt Injection Prevention Cheat Sheet**  
   https://cheatsheetseries.owasp.org/cheatsheets/LLM_Prompt_Injection_Prevention_Cheat_Sheet.html
3. **Brave: Agentic Browser Security — Indirect Prompt Injection in Perplexity Comet**  
   https://brave.com/blog/comet-prompt-injection/
4. **Unit 42: Fooling AI Agents — Web-Based Indirect Prompt Injection Observed in the Wild**  
   https://unit42.paloaltonetworks.com/ai-agent-prompt-injection/

## Notes

- These fixtures use language and techniques quoted or directly described in the linked sources.
- They are intentionally inert local HTML for testing extraction and detection only.
- Domains that appear in sources are kept as plain strings or dead links where useful for pattern coverage.
